game_name: Tiny Toon Adventures: Buster Busts Loose!

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Objectives vary level-to-level: feeding, defeating bosses (Duck Vader)
Extra containers found through exploration; reset per level
Optional extra life earning; variety based on spinning wheel (Wheel O'Comedy reference)
Removed in easy mode; difficulty spike indicator

typical_tension_triggers: Objective-dependent failures (e.g., failing to feed Dizzy before kitchen destruction)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Episodic structure with between-level minigame breaks; tension varies per level based on objective type

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden health containers found through exploration in levels

difficulty_curve.early_game: Children mode: smaller level layouts, higher health containers, single-player accessible
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Normal mode: full-sized levels, standard health, infinite continues (JP) or 5 continues (US/EU)
difficulty_curve.late_game: Challenge mode (US/EU only): full-sized levels identical to Normal, reduced to 1 health container, 3 continues only; full ending only unlocked on hard (Challenge) or normal (JP)
notable_spikes: Level 5 (Sky-jinx): completely removed in easy mode, difficulty indicator
Challenge mode: dramatic health reduction (1 container) and continue limitation

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level features distinct objective: feeding characters, defeating themed bosses (Duck Vader), retrieving items, etc. Objectives vary significantly level-to-level rather than repetitive combat
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 1 (Dizzy Devil kitchen); Boss level (Duck Vader)

notable_level_patterns.description: Health containers scattered through levels; players must explore to maximize health per stage. Containers reset after each level, creating per-level resource management tension
After each level, tension relief via spinning wheel minigame for extra lives. Variety includes: Squash, Maze, Bingo, Seesaw, and story cutscene (Back to the Future reference in Level 2 speedometer)
